fields.name: Sell-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer who returned the products.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer to whom you sent the invoice.

fields.name: Bill-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional line of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the customer's reference.
The program copies the reference from the Your Reference field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the ship-to address, in case it is a long address.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Order Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the order date for the return receipt.
The program copies the date from the Order Date field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the order date because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry's posting date.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: Posting Description
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type, such as Receipt, and the number of the entry.
The program copies the posting description from the Posting Description field in the Sales Header table.
The posting description also appears on customer and G/L entries.
You cannot change the posting description because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the payment terms that apply to the original sales header.
The program copies the payment terms code from the Payment Terms Code field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date that the original shipment is due for payment. The program calculates the date using the Payment Terms Code and Posting Date fields on the sales header.
You cannot change the due contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the payment discount percentage granted if payment is made by the date entered in the Pmt. Discount Date field.
The program copies the payment discount percentage from the Payment Discount % field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Pmt. Discount Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the last date on which the customer can pay the original invoice and still receive a payment discount.
The program copies the payment discount date from the Pmt. Discount Date field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason for the posted return.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location from where inventory items to the customer on the sales document are to be shipped by default.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Customer Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the customer posting group that was used when the return receipt was posted.
The program copies the customer posting group from the Customer Posting Group field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the customer posting group because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency that is used on the entry.

fields.name: Currency Factor
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Customer Price Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the customer price group used on the original credit memo.
The program copies the code from the Customer Price Group field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Prices Including VAT
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that the sales prices on the lines include VAT.
The program copies the information from the Prices Including VAT field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Invoice Disc. Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the invoice discount that was granted on the original invoice.
The program copies the invoice discount code from the Invoice Disc. Code field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Customer Disc. Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code used to calculate the customer's sales line discount.
The program copies the code from the Customer Disc. Group field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a code for the language used on the return receipt.
The program copies the code from the Language Code field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which salesperson is associated with the posted return receipts.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether a comment has been entered for this return receipt.
You can also enter a comment in Notes FactBox.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.

fields.name: On Hold
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the credit memo was marked as On Hold when it was posted as a return receipt.
The program copies the information from the On Hold field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the return receipt has been applied to a document that has already been posted. If so, the field contains the type of the document.
The program copies the type from the Applies-to Doc. Type field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the return receipt has been applied to a document that has already been posted. If so, the field contains the number of the document.
The program copies the number from the Applies-to Doc. No. field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a general ledger account number to which a balancing entry for the return receipt was posted.
The program copies the number from the Bal. Account No. field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's VAT registration number for customers.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reason code that is associated with the return receipt.
The program copies the reason code from the Reason Code field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the general business posting group that you assigned to the customer that you sent the original invoice to.
The program copies the code from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: EU 3-Party Trade
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the return receipt is part of an EU three-party trade transaction.
Three-party trade occurs when you ship an order to an address in one EU country/region and send the invoice to an address in a different EU country/region.
The program copies the information from the EU 3-Party Trade field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction type specified in the original sales header.
The program copies the transaction type from the Transaction Type field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transport method specified in the original sales header.
The program copies the transport method from the Transport Method field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip:
Shows the customer's VAT country/region code.
The program copies the VAT country/region code from the VAT Country/Region Code field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer who will receive the products and be billed by default.

fields.name: Sell-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the main address of the customer.

fields.name: Sell-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the address.

fields.name: Sell-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer's main address.

fields.name: Sell-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the customer's main address.

fields.name: Bill-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Bill-to County
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the county name in the customer's billing address.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Bill-to County field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Bill-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Sell-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the customer's main address.

fields.name: Sell-to County
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the county of the customer that the items were sold to.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Sell-to County field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Sell-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the customer's main address.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the county of the customer's shipping address.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Ship-to County field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the balancing account type used in the return receipt line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Bal. Account Type field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Exit Point
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the port of exit from which you shipped the items out of your country/region.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Exit Point field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether this posted return receipt was posted as a corrective entry.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Correction field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the area code used in the return receipt.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Area field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the transaction specification that was used in the return receipt.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Transaction Specification field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip:
Describes the code for the payment method used for payments from this customer.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Payment Method Code field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the shipping agent who is transporting the items.

fields.name: Package Tracking No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping agent's package number.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the return receipt.
The program automatically copies this field from the Return Receipt No. Series field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the ID of the user that posted the return receipt.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the source code that is linked to the return receipt header.
The program copies the code from either the Sales field or the Deleted Document field in the Source Code Setup table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the tax area code of the customer.
The program copies the code from the Tax Area Code field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that sales to the customer on the sales header are liable to sales tax.
The program copies the code from the Tax Liable field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of the customer.
The program copies the code from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Base Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the percentage to use to discount the VAT element if a payment discount is to be posted. The value is checked against the maximum possible value in the VAT Tolerance % field in the General Ledger Setup table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Campaign No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the campaign that the document is linked to.

fields.name: Sell-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact person at the customer's main address.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact person at the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the responsibility center, such as a distribution hub, that is associated with the involved user, company, customer, or vendor.

fields.name: Requested Delivery Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the requested delivery date.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Promised Delivery Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the promised delivery date as a result of the Order Promising function.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Shipping Time
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how long it takes to return the items.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Warehouse Handling Time
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how long it takes warehouse employees to handle the items.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Late Order Shipping
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Return Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the return order that will post a return receipt.

fields.name: Return Order No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series that was used to assign a number to the sales return order that the return receipt is related to.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a line discount has been calculated for the price offered.
